reason: Fix TS2345: ensureCoordinationTables returns Effect<void, DatabaseError, DatabaseAdapter>, but Tool.define init expects never error channel. Effect.orDie converts the DatabaseError into a defect.

   sessionId: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
   taskId: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
   wave: Schema.optional(Schema.Number),
@@ -506,7 +506,7 @@ export const CoordinationTool = Tool.define(

     const adapter = yield* DatabaseAdapter.Service
     // Ensure coordination tables exist on first tool load
